name: Carrot-Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients together and set aside.
2. Beat eggs; stir in oil, sugar, and vanilla.
3. Add applesauce and carrots to the egg mixture; mix well.
4. Gradually add flour mixture to the carrot mixture until combined.
5. Fold in raisins and 1/2 cup walnuts.
6. Pour batter into a greased pan. For a tube pan, sprinkle remaining walnuts on top.
7. Bake for 65 minutes (tube) or 45 minutes (9 x 13-inch).
8. Cool the cake in the pan for 15 minutes before removing it.
9. Store in an airtight container for up to 4-5 days.
Note: The cake can also be baked in two 8-inch square pans, three 8 x 4-inch foil loaf pans, six 6 x 3-inch small foil loaf pans, or a Bundtletts and Mini springform pans. Bake times may vary slightly depending on the pan size.
